visuals.title: Variable Inheritance Hierarchy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Variable Inheritance Hierarchy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Shell Variables and Environment</text>

  <!-- Shell Process -->
  <rect x="110" y="70" width="200" height="180" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Shell Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Local Variables -->
  <rect x="130" y="120" width="160" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Local Variables (current shell only)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Environment Variables -->
  <rect x="130" y="180" width="160" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Environment Variables (inherited)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Export Arrow -->
  <path d="M210 160 L210 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="230" y="175" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    export
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Child Process -->
  <rect x="280" y="240" width="100" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Child Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Inheritance Arrow -->
  <path d="M250 220 L310 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="270" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    inherits
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Environment Variables in Child -->
  <rect x="290" y="270" width="80" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="283" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ENV Vars
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>

nodes.label:
Parent Process
Local: local_var
Environment: env_var
